prompt: Use the uploaded photo as the PRIMARY FACE REFERENCE with STRICT FACE IDENTITY LOCK. Preserve her exact facial identity, facial proportions, hairstyle, skin tone, expression, and all unique facial characteristics. Do not beautify, alter, replace, or modify her face in any way. Ultra-realistic cinematic editorial collage portrait of a beautiful young Asian woman standing on a modern rooftop terrace during a breathtaking golden sunset overlooking a futuristic city skyline. She has fair glowing skin, soft feminine facial features, expressive brown eyes, glossy pink lips, and pastel pink hair styled in a high messy ponytail with loose strands framing her face. She wears elegant round rose-gold mirrored sunglasses reflecting the sunset city skyline, sparkling pink gemstone earrings, and a delicate gold necklace. She is dressed in an oversized off-shoulder fluffy pink knit sweater, high-waisted white cargo jogger pants with silver chain accessories, a luxury wristwatch, and chunky white sneakers. She is casually leaning against a concrete rooftop wall with one hand in her pocket, smiling confidently. Behind her is a gigantic artistic double-exposure portrait of herself seamlessly blended into the skyline, creating a surreal fashion editorial composition. Pink flower petals float through the air while soft pink powder clouds add a dreamy atmosphere. Birds fly across the glowing orange, peach, and pink sky. Warm golden-hour lighting, volumetric sunlight, cinematic rim light, ultra-detailed skin texture, realistic hair strands, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, HDR, vibrant colors, luxury fashion magazine aesthetic, Vogue editorial style, surreal photorealism, 85mm lens, f/1.8, ultra-sharp focus, 8K, masterpiece, award-winning photography. Negative Prompt: low quality, blurry, noisy, watermark, text, logo, AI artifacts, duplicate person, bad anatomy, deformed hands, extra fingers, extra limbs, cropped face, unrealistic skin, plastic skin, overexposed, oversaturated, cartoon, anime, CGI, painting, doll face, distorted sunglasses, poor lighting, jpeg artifacts, out of frame.

promptZh: 请使用上传的照片作为主要人脸参考（PRIMARY FACE REFERENCE），并严格锁定人脸特征（STRICT FACE IDENTITY LOCK）。请保留她原本的面部特征、面部比例、发型、肤色、表情以及所有独特的面部细节。严禁进行任何形式的美化、更改、替换或修饰。画面为超写实电影级时尚拼贴人像，一位美丽的年轻亚裔女性站在现代化的屋顶露台上，背景是俯瞰未来城市天际线的绝美金色日落。她拥有白皙透亮的肌肤、柔美的五官、富有神采的棕色眼睛、光泽的粉色嘴唇，以及扎成高马尾的粉色头发，发丝凌乱地散落在脸颊旁。她佩戴着优雅的圆形玫瑰金反光墨镜，镜片中映照出日落下的城市天际线，并戴着闪耀的粉色宝石耳环和精致的金项链。她身穿超大款露肩粉色毛绒针织衫，搭配高腰白色工装慢跑裤和银色链条配饰，佩戴奢华腕表，脚踩厚底白色运动鞋。她随意地倚靠在混凝土屋顶墙边，一只手插在口袋里，自信地微笑着。她身后是一个巨大的艺术化双重曝光肖像，与天际线完美融合，营造出超现实的时尚大片构图。粉色的花瓣在空中飘浮，柔和的粉色粉尘云增添了梦幻氛围。鸟儿飞过橙色、桃色和粉色交织的绚丽天空。温暖的黄金时刻光影、体积光、电影级轮廓光、超细腻皮肤纹理、逼真的发丝、浅景深、奶油般虚化效果、HDR、鲜艳色彩、奢华时尚杂志美学、Vogue 大片风格、超现实写实主义、85mm 镜头、f/1.8 光圈、超清晰对焦、8K 分辨率、杰作、获奖摄影作品。负面提示词：低质量、模糊、噪点、水印、文字、Logo、AI 伪影、人物重复、解剖结构错误、手部畸形、多余手指、多余肢体、面部裁剪、不真实的皮肤、塑料感皮肤、曝光过度、饱和度过高、卡通、动漫、CGI、绘画、玩偶脸、墨镜变形、光线不佳、JPEG 压缩伪影、超出画面。
